global_context.scene_description: A realistic exterior daytime photograph of a Phoenix-area residential driveway. In the background, a tan stucco single-story home with a terracotta tile roof, a mature palm tree, desert rock landscaping, and small cacti. Parked in the driveway, facing left and with its side panel fully visible to the camera, is a WHITE CHEVROLET EXPRESS cargo van. The van has a thin horizontal RED STRIPE running along the lower side panel from front to rear, and an aluminum LADDER RACK mounted on the roof. The van's side panel is heavily branded with the following visible decals, laid out clearly: (1) Right side of panel, large: a bold ASH logo — the word 'ASH' in thick black capital letters inside a thin rectangular black frame, with a small red-and-blue decorative arc underneath, and 'COOLING & HEATING' in thin subtitle text below. (2) Middle of panel, upper: a small American flag icon followed by bold black text 'VETERAN OWNED BUSINESS'. (3) Middle of panel, lower: bold red numerals '480-680-8651' with 'ASHCOOLING.COM' in bold black below. (4) Driver's door (front-left): a circular wreath badge reading 'A.S.H. — ARIZONA'S SERVICE HEROS' with a star in the center. (5) Small black text near the right edge of the panel: 'LICENSED BONDED INSURED'. (6) Lower-right corner, tiny text: 'ROC#356015'. An Arizona license plate on the front bumper. Standing in front of the van, in mid-stride walking toward the camera, is the owner/technician — a fit white male in his mid-30s with short auburn hair and light auburn stubble, wearing dark aviator sunglasses, a grey-and-white mesh trucker cap with a small leather 'ASH' patch on the front, a heather-grey short-sleeve t-shirt with a small black ASH logo embroidered on the left chest, dark-tan cargo work pants, and brown leather work boots. Both of his arms have dense tribal/floral sleeve tattoos visible from shoulder to wrist. In his right hand he holds a brown wooden clipboard. On the clipboard, a printed HVAC quote document is visible, with the bold printed text 'TOTAL: $14,500' crossed out with a single red marker line, and 'BEAT BY $4,200' written beside it in bold red handwritten marker. His posture is confident, purposeful, slight smile, not posed. Harsh midday Arizona sun from directly overhead casts crisp short shadows. Clear bright blue sky. Across the top 15% of the frame — OVERLAID on a clean dark-navy bar — bold white sans-serif headline reads: 'SEND US YOUR QUOTE. WE'LL SHOW UP AND BEAT IT.' Across the bottom 12% of the frame — OVERLAID as a solid red rectangular banner — bold white sans-serif text reads 'BEAT MY QUOTE →' on the left and the ASH Cooling & Heating logo appears on the right.

composition.framing: Medium wide — van fills right 60%, tech mid-left at 3/4 of frame height

composition.focal_point: Tech walking toward camera with marked-up clipboard; van is supporting brand context
composition.notes: Reserve top 15% for dark-navy headline bar. Reserve bottom 12% for red CTA banner. Scene middle 73%.
